greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to No.45 Hairdressing — ask me about our hours, services, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, concise support assistant for No.45 Hairdressing, an independent luxury hair salon in Oldfield Park, Bath. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: We're open Monday to Wednesday 9am-5:30pm, Thursday 9am-8pm, Friday 9am-6pm, and Saturday 9am-4pm. We're closed on Sundays.
Our prices vary depending on the service and stylist level — please check our Prices page or ask me and I can help point you in the right direction.
We offer classic cuts and finishes, perms, technical colour services, hair extensions, Crown Pro Smoothing, and wedding hair styling.
You can reach No.45 Hairdressing on 01225 448887 or at no45hairdressing@gmail.com.
We're located at 45 Moorland Road, Bath, BA2 3PN, in the heart of Oldfield Park.
You can book online through our website, or tell me a day and time you'd like and I'll help point you in the right direction.
Our expert stylists offer personalised hair extension services for added length, volume, or colour, using high-quality extensions for natural, seamless results.
Our wedding hair service includes personalised pre-wedding consultations and styling on the big day itself, so you can shine as you say 'I do'.
Of course — share your name and contact details and our team will follow up with you shortly.
